title: Legendary Reports
description: ⚠️ Plugin for reports, make a system /report on your server!
body:
![Test](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0447d0d2cb9ec847b93574c9a8fd3ba356e5b341.png)

![why](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/795147e936779c934efd0d95d5b9ebdb4d562d33.png)
- ⚠️ Сombining several reports into one (if they are from the same person).
- 💤 Complete customization of the menu, from the names to custom_model_data!
- 🏝️ Saving the date when the report was created.
- 🍉 The ability to close a report by pressing LMB.
- ⭐ The ability to insert your own command on the PCM.
- 💫 The ability to change the maximum number of pages.
- 🔦 The ability to change the slots in which reports may appear.
- 🤩 Admin notifications, during the report.
- ⁉️ Complete modification of all messages (which are written in the chat).
- 📛 Delete a report by ID.
- 📛 Delete all reports from a specific user.
- 📛 Delete multiple reports at once (/r-report <ID or ID'S).
- ♻️ The ability to use custom_model_data on each of the items.
- 💖 Russian and English Config!

![Comm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afa72a147bd35d86601c358caaef06f2451db0d5.png)
- 💫 Do you have an idea for this plugin? Not a question! Write to me in private messages in the Discord messenger. (@xaremy). I also have a personal telegram channel, if anyone is interested in following my life and developing projects, go there!\
- ⚠️ Latest version of the plugin: 1.3.0 FIXED

**⁉️ Did you find a bug? Write to me on discord and tell me about it!**

[![https://modrinth.com/plugin/legendary-joins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1adf58934ee5d982e2ca945b016b1be1e8d6a3d.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/legendary-joins)
